name: agora
description: Agora — local-first swarm intelligence engine (Neo4j + Ollama)
author: Alexander Schneider <https://alexle135.de>

scripts.setup: npm install && cd frontend && npm install
scripts.setup:all: npm run setup && npm run setup:backend
scripts.backend: cd backend && uv run python run.py
scripts.lint:backend: cd backend && uv run ruff check app/models/project.py app/services/run_registry.py app/utils/validation.py tests/test_project_manager.py tests/test_run_registry.py tests/test_validation.py
scripts.check: npm run lint:backend && npm run test:backend && npm run lint:frontend && npm run build:frontend
